/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc -g -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wall -Wextra -Wstrict-aliasing -Wno-unused-parameter -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/runtime-tests.dir/tests/RuntimeTests.c.o" "CMakeFiles/runtime-tests.dir/tests/ConcurrentMapTests.c.o" -o runtime-tests  libruntime.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmp.dylib
